query: SELECT id, livestreamDate, livestreamEndTime, streamerName, salesAmount, duration, viewerCount, likes, csvImported FROM brand_livestreams WHERE livestreamDate >= '2025-08-30' AND livestreamDate < '2025-09-01' ORDER BY livestreamDate;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, livestreamDate, livestreamEndTime, streamerName, salesAmount, duration, viewerCount, likes, csvImported FROM brand_livestreams WHERE livestreamDate >= '2025-08-30' AND livestreamDate < '2025-09-01' ORDER BY livestreamDate;
